mapper.sql: select a.tableproject, a.lastDate, a.TABLETYPE, a.tableNameEN, a.tableNameZH,a.LIFECYCLE, a.TABLEALLCOUNT,a.TABLESIZE, a.tableusecount,a.tableUseCountOfDay,a.tableUseCountOfWeek,a.tableUseCountOfMonth from( select s.tableproject,s.PARTITIONDATE as lastDate,s.TABLETYPE,s.tableproject||'.'||s.TABLENAME as tableNameEN,s.TABLECOMMENT as tableNameZH,s.LIFECYCLE,s.TABLEALLCOUNT,s.TABLESIZE, u.tableUseCountOfDay,u.tableUseCountOfWeek,u.tableUseCountOfMonth,u.tableUseCount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL s left join ( select t0.tablename,t0.project,t3.tableUseCountOfMonth,t2.tableUseCountOfWeek,t1.tableUseCountOfDay,t0.tableUseCount from ( select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCount,tablename,project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t group by tablename,project) t0 left join (select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfMonth,tablename,project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t where dt between to_char(trunc(sysdate - interval '31' day),'yyyy-MM-dd') and to_char(trunc(sysdate - interval '1' day),'yyyy-MM-dd') group by tablename,project) t3 on (t0.tablename=t3.tablename and t0.project = t3.project) left join (select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfWeek,tablename,project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t where dt between to_char(trunc(sysdate - interval '7' day),'yyyy-MM-dd') and to_char(trunc(sysdate - interval '1' day),'yyyy-MM-dd') group by tablename,project) t2 on (t0.tablename=t2.tablename and t0.project = t2.project) left join (select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfDay,tablename,project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t where dt=to_char(trunc(sysdate - interval '1' day),'yyyy-MM-dd') group by tablename,project) t1 on (t0.tablename=t1.tablename and t0.project = t1.project) ) u on (upper(u.tablename)=upper(s.tablename) and upper(s.tableproject)=upper(u.project)) ) a where lastDate = to_char(sysdate -1 ,'yyyyMMdd')
mapper.select:
select sum(table_use_count) from
select sum(table_use_count) as table_use_count from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where tablename = #{key} and project = #{map[${key}]}

select b.partitiondate,a.tablename as tableNameEN,a.tabletype,a.TABLECREATEDTIME,a.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,a.PARTITIONCOUNT,a.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,a.tableProject,a.tableSize from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a right join (select a.tablename,max(a.partitiondate) as partitiondate from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a group by a.tablename) b on (a.tablename=b.tablename and a.partitiondate = b.partitiondate)
